org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class TimeManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.TimeManager
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractTimeManager, FilteringTimeManager
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class TimeManager
extends Object
    Time Manager.

    simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Constructor Detail

      • TimeManager

        public TimeManager()
        Deprecated. 

    • Method Detail

      • setSimulationTime

        protected abstract void setSimulationTime(double time)
        Deprecated. 
        Set the current simulation time. It is the count of seconds since the starting of the simulation.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Parameters:
        time - is the new simulation time expresed in seconds.

      • setSimulationStepDuration

        protected abstract void setSimulationStepDuration(double step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Set the current simulation step duration. It is the duration of one simulation step expressed in the simulation time coordinate system.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Parameters:
        step_duration - is the new simulation time expresed in milliseconds.

      • beforeAgentScheduling

        final void beforeAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                         long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.

      • preAgentScheduling

        protected abstract void preAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                      long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.

      • afterAgentScheduling

        final void afterAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                        long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.

      • postAgentScheduling

        protected abstract void postAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                       long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.

      • getSimulationTime

        public abstract double getSimulationTime(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.
        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in the specified unit.

      • getSimulationTime

        public final double getSimulationTime()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in seconds.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        public abstract double getSimulationStepDuration(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        public final double getSimulationStepDuration()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.
